audit_items.proof_trace: Every free() call in aof.c is followed by either (a) immediate reassignment of the pointer (e.g., sdsfree(server.aof_buf) at L469 then sdsempty() at L470; sdsfree at L1744 then sdsempty at L1745; listRelease at L72 then listCreate at L74), (b) process termination via exit(1) with no subsequent dereference, or (c) scope exit of a local variable. The split freeFakeClientArgv/freeFakeClient design is intentional—freeFakeClient does not touch argv, preventing double-free; control-flow analysis confirms no code path calls both on the same fakeClient without an intervening exit(1). Redis's single-threaded event loop eliminates concurrent UAF; BIO threads receive only integral fd values, not pointers owned by aof.c.
